message:
refactor: Split Python/formatter.zig into modular directory structure

Split 1176-line formatter.zig into focused submodules:
- float_format.zig (92 lines) - Python float formatting
- object_format.zig (156 lines) - PyObject/dict formatting
- format_spec.zig (284 lines) - format spec parsing and application
- py_format.zig (381 lines) - pyFormat() builtin and string formatting

Main file now 53-line re-export module. Maintains CPython mirror
convention with formatter.zig + formatter/ directory.
